scripts.prepare:docs: node scripts/prepare-docs.mjs --target docusaurus && npm run prepare:prompts
scripts.prepare: npm run sync:docs && npm run prepare:docs
scripts.prepare:subset: npm run sync:docs:subset && npm run prepare:docs:subset
scripts.build: npm run prepare:prompts:check && npm --prefix prototypes/docusaurus run build
scripts.build:full: npm run prepare && npm run build
scripts.cloudflare:deploy: npm run build:full && npx wrangler pages deploy prototypes/docusaurus/build --project-name ${CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT:-reactonrails-com}
